'llT c~> ~~~~3FT amr..m ~. ~ a:r~ i'h:-~ 3lRW'T 1• • 1 ["ffT. ~- 6(7)/2000-~] -m~.~~ -qre; ft'tquf : -~ "3'tf ~f;,l'f~~ 1s +ri, 1968 ~ ~. ?ffi. an. 1781 wnr~mtmr !i ~ ~lqf ~ -G' Pi'"""lf&l ftn mu ~'!:R 1134 OI/2002 MTT'llT :- C1) ~ 1 ~. 1976, ~- <fiT. 3491 (2) ~12 -· 1985, Ofil. 311.3660 (3) ~. 5~, 1989, Ofil. 311. 527(a:r) (l) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 1HE GAZETIE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY IPART II-SEC_ 3(ii)] ================= ========~~============================= MINISTRY OF AGRO AND RURAL INDUSTRIES N011FICATION New Delhi, the 27th March, 2002 S.O. 384(E).-Inexerctse ofthepowers conferred by section 27 o£the Coir Industry Act, 1953 (45 of )953), the followmg bye-laws made by the Coir Board further to amend the Coir Board Employees (Conduct) Bye Laws, 1968, and confirmed by the Central Government, are hereby publiched, as required by sub·section (2) of sectwn 27 of the said Act, namely:- 1. (l) These Bye-Laws may be called the Coir Board Employees (Conduct) Amendment Bye·laws, 2002. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette .· ( 2. In the Coir Board Employees (Conduct) Bye-Laws, 1968, after bye-law 3, the following bye-law shall be inserted, namely:- "JA Prohibition of sexual harassment of working women:--- ( 1) No employee shall indulge in any act of sexual harassment of any woman at her work place (2) Every employee or person who is incharge of a work place shall take appropriate steps to prevent or deter the sexual harassment to any woman at such work place. Explanation :-For the purposes of this bye-law, "sexual harassment" includes such unwelcome sexually determmed behaviour whether directly or othcnvisc as:- (a) physical contact and advances; (b) a demand or request for sexual favour; (c) sexually coloured remarks; (d) showing pomography; or (e) any other unwelcome physical, verbal or non-verbal conduct of a sexual nature.". [F_ No 6(7)/2000-Coirl SHANKAR AGGARWAL, Jt. Secy. Footnote :~The principal bye-laws were published vtde number S.O_ 1781, dated the 15th May, J 968, and subsequently _amended vide number:- (1) S.O. 349l,dated 1st September, 1976 (2) S.O. 3660, dated 12th July, 1985 (3) S.O 527(E), dated 5th July, 1989 ------- ·------- --------------~-~---~--·--- Printed by the Manager, Govt. of lnd1a Pre•s, Ring Road, M11y11puri, New Delhi-H0064 and Published by the Controller of Publications.
